title: Formula 1：DQN和DDQN的MSE计算公式
formulas: DQN: a_{t + 1} = \mathop {\arg \max }\limits_{{a_{t + 1}}} Q_{tar}\left( s_{t + 1}, a_{t + 1} \right), MSE = \left|  r_t +\gamma Q_{tar}(s_{t+1}, a_{t+1}) - Q_{eval}(s_t, a_t) \right|^2
DDQN: a_{t + 1} = \mathop {\arg \max }\limits_{{a_{t + 1}}} Q_{eval}(s_{t + 1}, a_{t + 1}), MSE = \left|  r_t +\gamma Q_{tar}(s_{t+1}, a_{t+1}) - Q_{eval}(s_t, a_t) \right|^2.

title: Formula 2：Sarsa算法Q网络更新方式
formulas: {a_{t + 1}} = \mathop {\arg \max }\limits_{{a_{t + 1}}} Q\left( {{s_{t + 1}},{a_{t + 1}}} \right){\space\space}if{\rm{\space\space}}\mu  \le \varepsilon, {\rm{\space\space}}else{\rm{\space\space}}rand, MSE = \left|  r_t +\gamma Q_{tar}(s_{t+1}, a_{t+1}) - Q_{eval}(s_t, a_t) \right|^2

title: Formula 3：DQN连续动作空间Q值计算公式以及Q网络更新方式
